Years of Excellence
Who We Are

About SEBA

Established in 2008, SEBA Construction & Drilling Ltd is a Tanzanian-owned firm delivering excellence in groundwater exploration, borehole drilling, and civil construction. Registered as a Civil and Building Contractor since 2012, we have built a reputation for quality, safety, and timely project completion across the nation.

Our team of qualified engineers, geologists, and drilling experts is dedicated to providing personalized service unmatched in the industry. We guarantee to meet your project demands in a timely, cost-effective manner while upholding our standard of superiority.

Certified Contractor
Expert Team
Safety First
On-Time Delivery
Learn More About Us
What We Do

Our Services

Borehole Drilling

Expert DTH (Down-The-Hole) drilling technology with depths up to 350m. Geological sampling at 1m intervals with yield estimation.

Learn More

Groundwater Exploration

Comprehensive hydrogeological surveys using ABEM Terrameter SAS 1000 and PQWT S-300 ERT technology.

Learn More

Civil & Building Construction

Full-spectrum construction services including water supply projects, irrigation schemes, buildings, roads, and dams.

Learn More

Dewatering Services

Specialized dewatering for mining and construction sites including well point systems, deep wells, and sump pumping.

Learn More

Diamond & RC Drilling

Precision exploration drilling with RC rigs up to 450m and diamond drilling up to 800m depth for mining operations.

Learn More

Irrigation & Water Supply

Complete water infrastructure solutions from feasibility studies to construction of distribution systems.

Learn More
View All Services
Our Top Priority

Safety is the Most Important
Attribute to All Our Activities

Safety is the most important attribute to all our activities.

We ensure the health, safety, security and work environment of all members including visitors.

We conduct environmental assessments and mitigate all impacts during and post-construction.

We adapt all practical measures to protect and maintain the environment.

We comply with all safety and environmental regulations.

2 HSE Officers
On Staff
100%
Compliance Record
Zero
Lost-Time Incidents
Leadership

Message from the Director

MKAS

Director Photo

Mr. Khalid A. Salum

Managing Director

SEBA Construction & Drilling Ltd

For over seventeen years, SEBA Construction & Drilling Ltd has stood at the forefront of Tanzania's water and infrastructure development. Our journey from a small drilling firm to a full-service construction and drilling company reflects our unwavering commitment to excellence, innovation, and most importantly, the safety and wellbeing of every person on our sites.

We understand that every project we undertake impacts communities, economies, and environments. That is why we invest in modern equipment, continuous staff training, and rigorous safety protocols. Whether we are drilling a borehole in a remote village or constructing a water supply scheme for thousands, our standards never waver. We are experienced, we are ready, and we are committed to delivering results that exceed expectations while keeping safety as our highest priority.

Excellence
In Every Project
Safety
Always First
Delivery
On Time, Every Time

Modern Machinery

Our Equipment Fleet

Drilling

  • Drilling Rig (DTH)

    350m max depth — DTH (Down-The-Hole) Method

  • RC Drilling Rig

    450m max — Multipurpose RC & Diamond drilling

  • RC Drilling Rig (200m)

    200m max — Multipurpose RC & Diamond drilling

  • Diamond Drilling Rig (DD)

    800m max depth — Precision core sampling

  • Blast Hole Drilling Rig

    40m max depth — DTH Method for mining

  • Mud Rotary Rig

    350m max — For loose formation clay and sandy soil

Pumping

  • Submersible Pump

    6" diameter — 100,000 L/hr capacity for pumping tests

Dewatering

  • Mobile Diesel Water Pump

    Centrifugal dewatering pump — Diesel powered

  • DynaWater Pump

    High-capacity dewatering system

  • Borehole Submersible Dewatering Pump

    Deep well dewatering for mining pits

  • Monoblock Dewatering Pump

    Compact dewatering for temporary works

Civil

  • Excavator

    Heavy earthworks and trenching

  • Motor Grader

    Road leveling and grading

  • Steel Drum Roller

    Soil and asphalt compaction

  • Concrete Mixer

    On-site concrete batching

  • Backhoe Loader

    Versatile earthworks and loading

Survey

  • ABEM Terrameter SAS 1000

    Resistivity measurement for hydrogeological survey

  • PQWT S-300

    Natural electric field ERT survey — Electrical Resistivity Tomography

Well Casing

UPVC casing installation to maintain well integrity and prevent collapse.

Well Development

Mechanical surging and air/water jetting to repair aquifer damage and remove fine particles.

Well Testing

Step drawdown and constant pumping tests with chemical analysis for yield verification.

View Full Equipment List
Testimonials

What Our Clients Say

“SEBA delivered the Chekeleni Village water extension project on time with exceptional quality. Their safety standards throughout the project were commendable.”

RUWASA Mtwara
Regional Water Authority

“The piped water system constructed by SEBA has transformed water access for Ihenje Village. Professional team, modern equipment, and strict adherence to safety protocols.”

G
Gairo District Council
Local Government Authority

Trusted Partners

Clients We Work With

Our Advantages

Why Choose SEBA

Safety First

Priority

Safety is our highest priority. With 2 dedicated HSE officers and a 100% compliance record, we ensure every project site meets the strictest safety standards.

Timely Delivery

We understand the importance of deadlines. Our project management expertise ensures on-time completion without compromising quality or safety.

Expert Team

Our team includes 3 Civil Engineers, 5 Drilling Experts, a Geology Engineer, and dedicated HSE Officers — all permanent staff with deep expertise.

Modern Equipment

From 800m diamond drilling rigs to ABEM Terrameter survey equipment, we invest in the best tools to deliver precise, efficient results.

Ready to Start Your Project?

Contact us today for a free consultation. Let's discuss how SEBA can deliver exceptional results for your drilling or construction needs.
